description: An end-user accidentally deleted an important file from a shared network drive and needs it restored from last night's backup.

nodes.task_description: Identify the file server and the exact path and name of the file that needs to be restored.

expected_outcome.expected: The technician has the full path of the deleted file.

nodes.task_description: Access the backup system, browse the previous night's backup set for the file server, and locate the file.

expected_outcome.expected: The technician successfully finds the file in the backup archive.

nodes.task_description: Restore the file to its original location and notify the user that it is available.

expected_outcome.expected: The file is successfully restored, and the user's issue is resolved.
